example.title: Customer-support backlog reduction business need
example.inputs: Backlog tickets >7d = 412 (analytics export). Support NPS = -22 (survey n=320). Sponsor: COO.
example.output: { "problem_statement": "Customer-support backlog >7 days exceeds 400 tickets sustaining negative NPS.", "affected_stakeholders": ["Olena Kovalenko (COO)", "Maria Tkachuk (Support Lead)"], "evidence": [{"url": "repo://analytics/backlog.csv", "retrieved_at": "2026-05-20"}, {"url": "repo://surveys/nps-q2.csv", "retrieved_at": "2026-05-18"}], "success_metric": {"name": "backlog>7d count", "target": 80, "baseline": 412, "source": "analytics export"}, "do_nothing_baseline": "Backlog forecast to reach 600 by Q4 based on 14-day rolling average.", "sponsor": "Olena Kovalenko (COO)" }
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (named sponsor), r2 (2 evidence rows), r3 (one metric), r4 (do-nothing), r5 (no vendors).
